sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὠτίον

- Transliteration: Otion

- Phonetic: o-tee'-on

- Definition:

1. the ear

- Origin: diminutive of G3775

- TDNT entry: 14:18,7

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Diminutive of G3775; an earlet that is one of the ears or perhaps the lobe of the ear: - ear.
